findings.jp: 画像データの中から一定の特徴を持つモノを判別したり、画像を生成したりすること。例えば、スマートフォンの顔認証やナンバープレート認識システム、アート作品の生成など
findings.zh: 从图像数据中判别具有特定特征的物体，或生成图像。例如，智能手机的人脸识别、车牌识别系统、艺术作品的生成等。
findings.en: Identifying objects with certain features from image data or generating images. Examples include smartphone facial recognition, license plate recognition systems, and the generation of artwork.
findings.issue: Table row uses '判别' while the standalone term at entity[3] uses '识别' for the same JP source. Inconsistent ZH terminology within same page.
findings.recommended_fix: Unify to '识别' (the more idiomatic choice for 認識) in both places.

findings.jp: 音声データの中から、一定の特徴を持つ音を判別したり、音声を生成したりすること。例えば、Webサイトの読み上げ機能や、実際の声優の代わりになる音声の生成など
findings.zh: 从语音数据中判别具有特定特征的声音，或生成语音。例如，网站的朗读功能、代替真人配音演员的语音生成等。
findings.en: Identifying sounds with certain features from audio data or generating speech. Examples include text-to-speech functions on websites and the generation of voices that substitute for real voice actors.
findings.issue: Same '判别' vs '识别' inconsistency with entity[5] standalone term ('识别'). Within-page consistency drift.
findings.recommended_fix: Standardize to '识别' across both occurrences.

findings.issue: Asymmetric expansion: ZH expands acronym with full name in parentheses, EN leaves bare 'GPS'. For consistency, EN could also gloss as 'GPS (Global Positioning System)' on first mention, matching the pattern used for CRM/SDGs/CSR elsewhere.
findings.recommended_fix: Either expand EN to 'GPS (Global Positioning System)' or drop the ZH expansion to keep symmetry.
